R1: executed_by(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'database') and exists(tree, 'scan customer identity') and precedence(tree, 'activate account', 'scan customer identity')
R2: exists(tree, 'retain identity check history') and leads_to(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'retain identity check history')
R3: data_leads_to_absence(tree, '(accountBalance <= 0) and (customerType not == "VIP") and (managerApproved not == true)', 'End Activity')
R4: condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(accountBalance <= 0) and (customerType not == "VIP")', 'approve account overdraft') and executed_by(tree, 'approve account overdraft', 'bank manager')
